{{ $starters := .Site.Params.chat.starters | default "" }} {{/* Vendor the XSS-critical dependencies locally so Hugo can fingerprint them and the served URL itself encodes integrity. A CDN compromise of DOMPurify or marked would otherwise silently defeat our HTML sanitization. */}} {{ $marked := resources.Get "js/vendor/marked-15.0.0.js" | resources.Fingerprint }} {{ $markedHighlight := resources.Get "js/vendor/marked-highlight-2.2.1.js" | resources.Fingerprint }} {{ $dompurify := resources.Get "js/vendor/dompurify-3.2.4.js" | resources.Fingerprint }} {{/* data-site-id owns the EmbeddingCache collection name. We use the zone path (which Zeitung's build plants into .Site.Title) because it's unique-per-zone and build-owned — the runtime DNS-segment approach silently collides between zones that share a hostname prefix. */}}
